'''wahuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yair|yair]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yair|yair]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wahuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæhizhith|wæhizhith]] || [[word:wæhizhij|wæhizhij]] || [[word:wæhizhish|wæhizhish]] || [[word:wæhizhi|wæhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahuhuzhuth|wahuhuzhuth]] || [[word:wahuhuzhuj|wahuhuzhuj]] || [[word:wahuhuzhush|wahuhuzhush]] || [[word:wahuhuzhu|wahuhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahuzhuth|wahuzhuth]] || [[word:wahuzhuj|wahuzhuj]] || [[word:wahuzhush|wahuzhush]] || [[word:wahuzhu|wahuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahufzhuth|wahufzhuth]] || [[word:wahufzhuj|wahufzhuj]] || [[word:wahufzhush|wahufzhush]] || [[word:wahufzhuf|wahufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wahuzhuthu|wahuzhuthu]] || [[word:wahuzhuju|wahuzhuju]] || [[word:wahuzhushu|wahuzhushu]] || [[word:wahuzhuku|wahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wahuzhuth|wahuzhuth]] || [[word:wahuzhuj|wahuzhuj]] || [[word:wahuzhush|wahuzhush]] || [[word:wahuzhu|wahuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wahuzhuthul|wahuzhuthul]] || [[word:wahuzhujul|wahuzhujul]] || [[word:wahuzhushul|wahuzhushul]] || [[word:wahuzhukul|wahuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wahuzhuthuthu|wahuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:wahuzhujuju|wahuzhujuju]] || [[word:wahuzhushushu|wahuzhushushu]] || [[word:wahuzhuku|wahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wahuzhuthun|wahuzhuthun]] || [[word:wahuzhujun|wahuzhujun]] || [[word:wahuzhushun|wahuzhushun]] || [[word:wahuzhukun|wahuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wahuzhuthuoro|wahuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:wahuzhujuoro|wahuzhujuoro]] || [[word:wahuzhushuoro|wahuzhushuoro]] || [[word:wahuzhukuoro|wahuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
